name: percus-review
description: Percus kit Fase 7 v6.8.0 — Sprint v6.8 canonizacao do padrao auth (5 frentes A-E). Endpoint publico GET /tenants/by-origin no auth-service, templates/login-ui canonicos, scaffold-percus-project.ps1/.sh idempotente, R7.5 (audience kebab-case) + R7.6 (tenant detection) cravadas no canon, lib percus-auth bump 0.3.x -> 0.4.0. Mantém v6.7.2 (cross-repo R11 + diagnostic hardening), v6.7.1 (marketplace.json sync + pre-push guard), v6.7.0 (anti-hallucination Sprint 1+2), v6.6.x (F.1 cache + orchestrator integration), v6.5.x, v6.4.0, v6.3.0.
